def find_length(s):
    n = len(s)
    max_diff = -float('inf')
    prefix_0 = [0] * (n + 1)
    prefix_1 = [0] * (n + 1)
    for i in range(n):
        prefix_0[i+1] = prefix_0[i] + (1 if s[i] == '0' else 0)
        prefix_1[i+1] = prefix_1[i] + (1 if s[i] == '1' else 0)
    for i in range(n):
        for j in range(i, n):
            current_diff = 2 * (prefix_0[j+1] - prefix_0[i]) - (j - i + 1)
            if current_diff > max_diff:
                max_diff = current_diff
    return max_diff
